pos_sentences: Big companies like decathlon, infosys, icici have come here for the student's placement and almost everyone gets the placement
The friendly nature of faculty here, they're professionals and phd holders
I like the hostel of this college because it is good
The rooms were clean and the warden was very friendly.

Course fee 140000 campus visiting good companies as like microsoft another also good environment in campus placement senior also help me how to placement new scholarship feel i like your government and other also reliance
The companies that came here for the internships and placements are well known all over the country and it gives nice opportunity for everyone.
The faculty are super nice, and friendly and they're so professional.
Srms have friendly teachers who help you professionally and personally and also help to guide you in the right direction.

60% marks pcm is a minimum 1000 application fee10/07/2023 good university and teachers good and campus also good and faculty also good environment playground also beg no seniort in campus , placement is also good is in university
neg_sentences: I don't like the management are not supportive
College is too far from Lucknow, but they provide bus service and the cost of it around 26,000
Here , college is organised the market welfare, so this will improve your interpersonal and communication skill.
